description: Letter fragment. The opening lines are poetic Hebrew blessings and the continuation is in Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions hiding something in a chest lest someone buy it, until further orders arrive. Greetings to "his holy presence" (הדרתו הקדושה). There may be a faint mirror-image imprint of the address on verso.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
